recommendations.title: Inside Llewyn Davis
recommendations.overview: In Greenwich Village in the early 1960s, gifted but volatile folk musician Llewyn Davis struggles with money, relationships, and his uncertain future.

recommendations.title: No Country for Old Men
recommendations.overview: Llewelyn Moss stumbles upon dead bodies, $2 million and a hoard of heroin in a Texas desert, but methodical killer Anton Chigurh comes looking for it, with local sheriff Ed Tom Bell hot on his trail. The roles of prey and predator blur as the violent

recommendations.title: True Grit
recommendations.overview: Following the murder of her father by a hired hand, a 14-year-old farm girl sets out to capture the killer. To aid her, she hires the toughest U.S. Marshal she can find—a man with 'true grit'—Reuben J. 'Rooster' Cogburn.

recommendations.title: A Serious Man
recommendations.overview: It is 1967, and Larry Gopnik, a physics professor at a quiet Midwestern university, has just been informed by his wife Judith that she is leaving him. She has fallen in love with one of his more pompous acquaintances Sy Ableman.

recommendations.title: Miller's Crossing
recommendations.overview: Set in 1929, a political boss and his advisor have a parting of the ways when they both fall for the same woman.

recommendations.title: Burn After Reading
recommendations.overview: When a disc containing memoirs of a former CIA analyst falls into the hands of gym employees, Linda and Chad, they see a chance to make enough money for Linda to have life-changing cosmetic surgery. Predictably, events whirl out of control for the du

recommendations.title: The Ladykillers
recommendations.overview: An eccentric, if not charming Southern professor and his crew pose as a band in order to rob a casino, all under the nose of his unsuspecting landlord – a sharp old woman.

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Buster Scruggs
recommendations.overview: Vignettes weaving together the stories of six individuals in the old West at the end of the Civil War. Following the tales of a sharp-shooting songster, a wannabe bank robber, two weary traveling performers, a lone gold prospector, a woman traveling

recommendations.title: Barton Fink
recommendations.overview: A renowned New York playwright is enticed to California to write for the movies and discovers the hellish truth of Hollywood.

recommendations.title: O Brother, Where Art Thou?
recommendations.overview: In the deep south during the 1930s, three escaped convicts search for hidden treasure while a relentless lawman pursues them.
